parts.text:
```plantuml
@startuml
actor User
participant Application
participant "Auto SDK Engine" as Engine <<engine>> #LightSkyBlue
participant Alexa <<avs>> #LightGreen

alt "Activating Trial"
    note over User, Application
        clicks `Activate Trial` button
        on screen to activate
        trial up-sell.
    end note
    Application -> Engine: Publish SendConnectivityEvent message specifying **ACTIVATE_TRIAL** event
    activate Engine #LightSkyBlue
else "Activating Paid Plan"
    note over User, Application
        clicks `Activate Paid Plan` button
        on screen to activate
        paid plan up-sell.
    end note
    Application -> Engine: Publish SendConnectivityEvent message specifying **ACTIVATE_PAID_PLAN** event
end

Engine -> Alexa: InitiateDataPlanSubscription event

alt "Successful in sending event to Alexa"
    Engine -> Application: Receive SendConnectivityEventReply message with **SUCCESS** status
else "on failure"
    Engine -> Application: Receive SendConnectivityEventReply message with **FAIL** status
    deactivate Engine
end
@enduml
```
